message:
feat: add handler patrol for Dog lifecycle and plugin dispatch

Adds daemon heartbeat handler that manages Dog lifecycle:
- cleanupStuckDogs: detects working dogs with dead tmux sessions and clears work
- dispatchPlugins: scans plugins, evaluates cooldown gates, dispatches to idle dogs
- Guarded by IsPatrolEnabled(config, "handler"), defaults to enabled

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
